svg.title: Build rhythm: Codex lifetime, site-build token rhythm, and GitHub activity
svg.desc: Build rhythm contains three independent scopes: a rounded combined Codex lifetime, a repo-scoped site-build token rhythm, and aggregate weekly GitHub activity. Combined Codex lifetime: 48.8B tokens, rounded to the nearest 0.1 billion and observed Jul 22, 2026. It is combined before publication; per-source readings and identities are not published. Provenance: automatic refresh. Site-build token rhythm: a repo-scoped cumulative daily estimate, separate from lifetime usage. It runs from May 22, 2026 through Jul 21, 2026 and ends at 9.42B estimated tokens. Only rounded cumulative points are published. GitHub activity, last five years at weekly grain. Totals: 3,191 commits, 31,428,945 additions, 30,825,838 deletions, and 160 active weeks.
svg.text: Three privacy-safe scopes, kept deliberately separate

g.desc: Combined Codex lifetime: 48.8B tokens, rounded to the nearest 0.1 billion and observed Jul 22, 2026. It is combined before publication; per-source readings and identities are not published. Provenance: automatic refresh. Site-build token rhythm: a repo-scoped cumulative daily estimate, separate from lifetime usage. It runs from May 22, 2026 through Jul 21, 2026 and ends at 9.42B estimated tokens. Only rounded cumulative points are published.

g.aria-label: Repo-scoped estimated daily site-build token rhythm

g.text: Lifetime: nearest 0.1B, summed before publication, no per-source readings
Site build: cumulative estimate since May 22, 2026

g.desc: GitHub activity, last five years at weekly grain. Totals: 3,191 commits, 31,428,945 additions, 30,825,838 deletions, and 160 active weeks.

svg.text: Independent scopes · no identities or per-source history
